title: Guidelines on the Privacy of Individuals and Data Protection in the Telecommunications Sector
summary: Creates telecom-sector expectations for handling subscriber, traffic, communications and service data and complements the Personal Data Protection Law for digital communications and OTT-adjacent services delivered by licensees.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.ott_digit: Sector privacy and data protection guidance for telecommunications operators.
theme_notes.data_privacy.personal_data_protection: Telecom-sector privacy and data protection guideline.

notes: Related instruments: Produced after TRA 2023 privacy consultation and relates to Personal Data Protection Law No. 30 of 2018
